setting: 週末の予定を分刻みで立てて焦っているAを、Bが「もっとリラックスしよう」と諭すシーン。
lyrics:
Well, you done done me and you bet I felt it
I tried to be chill, but you're so hot that I melted
I fell right through the cracks
Now I'm trying to get back
Before the cool done run out
I'll be giving it my bestest
And nothing's gonna stop me but divine intervention
I reckon it's again my turn
To win some or learn some

But I won't hesitate no more, no more
It cannot wait, I'm yours

Well, open up your mind and see like me
Open up your plans and, damn, you're free
Look into your heart and you'll find love, love, love, love
Listen to the music of the moment, people dance and sing
We're just one big family
And it's our God-forsaken right to be loved, loved, loved, loved, loved

So I won't hesitate no more, no more
It cannot wait, I'm sure
There's no need to complicate
Our time is short
This is our fate, I'm yours

D-d-do you, but do you, d-d-do you want to come on?
Scooch on over closer, dear
And I will nibble your ear

I've been spending way too long checking my tongue in the mirror
And bending over backwards just to try to see it clearer
But my breath fogged up the glass
And so I drew a new face and I laughed
I guess what I'll be saying is there ain't no better reason
To rid yourself of vanities and just go with the seasons
It's what we aim to do
Our name is our virtue

But I won't hesitate no more, no more
It cannot wait, I'm yours

Well, open up your mind and see like me
Open up your plans and, damn, you're free
Look into your heart and you'll find that the sky is yours
So please don't, please don't, please don't
There's no need to complicate
'Cause our time is short
This, oh this, oh this is our fate
I'm yours

lyricsJa.en: Well, you done done me and you bet I felt it
lyricsJa.ja: 君にすっかりやられちゃったよ、もちろん僕も感じてたさ

lyricsJa.en: I tried to be chill, but you're so hot that I melted
lyricsJa.ja: クールでいようとしたけど、君が魅力的すぎて溶けそうだった

lyricsJa.en: I fell right through the cracks
lyricsJa.ja: 隙間から落ちてしまったんだ

lyricsJa.en: Now I'm trying to get back
lyricsJa.ja: 今、なんとか自分を取り戻そうとしているところさ

lyricsJa.en: Before the cool done run out
lyricsJa.ja: この熱が冷めてしまう前に

lyricsJa.en: I'll be giving it my bestest
lyricsJa.ja: 全力でぶつかるつもりだよ

lyricsJa.en: And nothing's gonna stop me but divine intervention
lyricsJa.ja: 神様のお告げでもない限り、誰も僕を止められないよ

lyricsJa.en: I reckon it's again my turn
lyricsJa.ja: また僕の番が来たと思ってるんだ

lyricsJa.en: To win some or learn some
lyricsJa.ja: 勝つか、あるいは何かを学ぶためのね

lyricsJa.en: But I won't hesitate no more, no more
lyricsJa.ja: でも、もう躊躇わない、もう二度と

lyricsJa.en: It cannot wait, I'm yours
lyricsJa.ja: もう待てないんだ、僕は君のものさ

lyricsJa.en: Well, open up your mind and see like me
lyricsJa.ja: さあ、心を開いて、僕と同じように世界を見てごらん

lyricsJa.en: Open up your plans and, damn, you're free
lyricsJa.ja: 予定なんて開け放ってしまえ、ほら、君は自由だ

lyricsJa.en: Look into your heart and you'll find love, love, love, love
lyricsJa.ja: 自分の心の中を覗いてみて、愛が見つかるはずさ

lyricsJa.en: Listen to the music of the moment, people dance and sing
lyricsJa.ja: 今この瞬間の音楽を聴いて、人々は踊り、歌う

lyricsJa.en: We're just one big family
lyricsJa.ja: 僕らはただの大きな家族なんだ

lyricsJa.en: And it's our God-forsaken right to be loved, loved, loved, loved, loved
lyricsJa.ja: 愛し愛されるのは、神様から与えられた僕らの当然の権利なんだよ

lyricsJa.en: So I won't hesitate no more, no more
lyricsJa.ja: だから、もう躊躇わない、もう二度と

lyricsJa.en: It cannot wait, I'm sure
lyricsJa.ja: もう待てないんだ、間違いない

lyricsJa.en: There's no need to complicate
lyricsJa.ja: 難しく考える必要なんてない

lyricsJa.en: Our time is short
lyricsJa.ja: 僕たちの時間は短いんだから

lyricsJa.en: This is our fate, I'm yours
lyricsJa.ja: これが僕らの運命、僕は君のものだ

lyricsJa.en: D-d-do you, but do you, d-d-do you want to come on?
lyricsJa.ja: ねえ、こっちに来ないか？

lyricsJa.en: Scooch on over closer, dear
lyricsJa.ja: もっと近くにおいでよ

lyricsJa.en: And I will nibble your ear
lyricsJa.ja: 君の耳を甘噛みしてあげるから

lyricsJa.en: I've been spending way too long checking my tongue in the mirror
lyricsJa.ja: 鏡の前で自分の舌をチェックするのに、時間をかけすぎたよ

lyricsJa.en: And bending over backwards just to try to see it clearer
lyricsJa.ja: もっとはっきり見ようと、無理な姿勢で力んで頑張っていたけど

lyricsJa.en: But my breath fogged up the glass
lyricsJa.ja: 僕の息でガラスが曇ってしまって

lyricsJa.en: And so I drew a new face and I laughed
lyricsJa.ja: だからそこに新しい顔を描いて、笑ったんだ

lyricsJa.en: I guess what I'll be saying is there ain't no better reason
lyricsJa.ja: 僕が言いたいのは、これ以上の理由なんてないってこと

lyricsJa.en: To rid yourself of vanities and just go with the seasons
lyricsJa.ja: 虚栄心を捨てて、季節の流れに身を任せるためのね

lyricsJa.en: It's what we aim to do
lyricsJa.ja: それが僕らの目指すところ

lyricsJa.en: Our name is our virtue
lyricsJa.ja: ありのままでいることが僕らの美徳なんだ

lyricsJa.en: But I won't hesitate no more, no more
lyricsJa.ja: だからもう躊躇わない、もう二度と

lyricsJa.en: It cannot wait, I'm yours
lyricsJa.ja: もう待てないんだ、僕は君のものさ

lyricsJa.en: Well, open up your mind and see like me
lyricsJa.ja: さあ、心を開いて、僕みたいに見てごらん

lyricsJa.en: Open up your plans and, damn, you're free
lyricsJa.ja: 予定なんて開け放ってしまえ、ほら、君は自由だ

lyricsJa.en: Look into your heart and you'll find that the sky is yours
lyricsJa.ja: 心の中を覗いてみて、この空は君のものなんだって気づくから

lyricsJa.en: So please don't, please don't, please don't
lyricsJa.ja: だからお願い、どうか

lyricsJa.en: There's no need to complicate
lyricsJa.ja: 難しく考える必要なんてないんだ

lyricsJa.en: 'Cause our time is short
lyricsJa.ja: だって僕たちの時間は短いから

lyricsJa.en: This, oh this, oh this is our fate
lyricsJa.ja: これが、そう、これが僕らの運命なんだ

lyricsJa.en: I'm yours
lyricsJa.ja: 僕は君のものさ

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Okay, if we leave now, we can hit the museum by 1 PM, grab coffee at 2:15, and...
sentences.displayHtml: Okay, if we leave now, we can hit the museum by 1 PM, grab coffee at 2:15, and...

sentences.text: wait, we're already ten minutes behind schedule!
sentences.displayHtml: wait, we're already ten minutes behind schedule!

conversation.japanese: よし、今出れば1時に美術館に着いて、2時15分にコーヒーを飲んで…待って、もう予定より10分も遅れてる！

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Hey, take a deep breath.
sentences.displayHtml: Hey, take a deep breath.

sentences.text: There's really no need to complicate our whole weekend.
sentences.displayHtml: There's really no need to complicate our whole weekend.

sentences.text: Let's just relax.
sentences.displayHtml: Let's just relax.

conversation.japanese: ねえ、深呼吸して。週末の予定を難しく考える必要なんてないよ。ただリラックスしよう。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: But I spent so much time planning this!
sentences.displayHtml: But I spent so much time planning this!

sentences.text: I want everything to be perfect.
sentences.displayHtml: I want everything to be perfect.

conversation.japanese: でも、計画するのにすごく時間をかけたんだ！全部完璧にこなしたいんだよ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: I know, but our time is short, and stressing out is just going to ruin it.
sentences.displayHtml: I know, but our time is short, and stressing out is just going to ruin it.

sentences.text: Open up your plans and be a little flexible.
sentences.displayHtml: Open up your plans and be a little flexible.

conversation.japanese: わかるけど、僕たちの時間は短いんだから、ピリピリしてたら台無しになっちゃうよ。予定を開け放って、もう少し柔軟になろう。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: You're right...
sentences.displayHtml: You're right...

sentences.text: I guess I've been overthinking it.
sentences.displayHtml: I guess I've been overthinking it.

sentences.text: I always try to control every single detail.
sentences.displayHtml: I always try to control every single detail.

conversation.japanese: 確かに…考えすぎてたかも。いつも細かいところまで全部コントロールしようとしちゃうんだ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Exactly.
sentences.displayHtml: Exactly.

sentences.text: Just rid yourself of those vanities and go with the seasons.
sentences.displayHtml: Just rid yourself of those vanities and go with the seasons.

sentences.text: Let's see where the day takes us.
sentences.displayHtml: Let's see where the day takes us.

conversation.japanese: その通り。完璧に見せたい見栄なんか捨てて、流れに身を任せてみようよ。今日が僕たちをどこへ連れて行くか見てみよう。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Okay, I'll put my schedule away.
sentences.displayHtml: Okay, I'll put my schedule away.

sentences.text: Let's just walk around and see what we find.
sentences.displayHtml: Let's just walk around and see what we find.

sentences.text: I won't hesitate no more.
sentences.displayHtml: I won't hesitate no more.

conversation.japanese: わかった、スケジュール帳はしまうね。ただ歩き回って、何が見つかるか見てみよう。もう心配してためらったりしないよ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Now you're talking!
sentences.displayHtml: Now you're talking!

sentences.text: Just listen to the music of the moment, and we'll have a great time.
sentences.displayHtml: Just listen to the music of the moment, and we'll have a great time.

conversation.japanese: その意気だよ！今この瞬間の雰囲気（音楽）を感じれば、きっと楽しい時間が過ごせるさ。
